meta.title: My programs — a tailored plan that fits you
meta.description: Structured programs over 4 to 8 weeks, fitted to your frequency and level. Generated by AI in 30 seconds or pick from the standard programs.

hero.title: A tailored plan that fits you.
hero.subtitle: 3 questions, your complete plan in 30 seconds. Your frequency, your goal, your level — the AI builds the program. And each cycle adjusts so you don't burn out.

benefits.ai_body: Goal, frequency, level. You answer, the AI builds a structured plan week by week. No catalog to comb through.
benefits.rest_title: Rest is part of the plan
benefits.rest_body: An easier week is built into the cycle so you actually recover. Planned rest is what makes you progress instead of plateau.
benefits.personal_title: Fits you, not the other way around
benefits.personal_body: You decide how many sessions per week you can give. The program adapts — you don't have to bend to a rigid format.
benefits.fixed_title: Or start with a ready-made plan
benefits.fixed_body: 3 standard programs ready to launch if you want to skip the questions: beginner, get-back-in-shape, cardio express.

final_cta.title: Launch your plan in 30 seconds.
final_cta.subtitle: Create a free account, answer 3 questions, your program is ready.
